title: Interlock Requirements: Manufacturing vs End User
content:
Manufacturer Mandate:

There is a legal mandate in FLPPS (21 CFR 1040.10) requiring manufacturers to provide an external interlock on all commercial Class 3B and Class 4 lasers.

End User Gap:

Interestingly, there is NO federal legal mandate requiring the end client to actually USE the interlock. The interlock connector typically comes from the manufacturer in an electrically shorted state.

Practical Consequences:

This gap means lasers are often placed into service without proper interlock system configuration. The safety responsibility falls on the employer and Laser Safety Officer.

Why No End User Mandate?

There are thousands of possible laser applications, making a one-size-fits-all mandate impractical. The responsibility shifts to the LSO to monitor and enforce laser safety issues.

LSO Responsibilities:

The laser safety officer must:
- Monitor laser safety compliance
- Enforce safety protocols
- Ensure interlocks are properly configured when appropriate
- Address the increased risks from DIY laser construction

surprising_fact.fact: The interlock connector on your Class 4 laser probably came from the manufacturer already shorted (disabled).
surprising_fact.why: There's no federal mandate requiring users to connect interlocks, only that manufacturers provide them.
surprising_fact.implication: The safety responsibility falls on YOU and your LSO to properly configure interlocks.

manufacturer_must: Design interlock to disable laser when open
user_should: Connect interlock to appropriate safety system
manufacturer_vs_user_comparison.legal_reality: Manufacturer compliance is MANDATORY; user interlock usage is RECOMMENDED but not legally required by FDA

why_no_mandate_explained.reason: There are thousands of possible laser applications, making a one-size-fits-all mandate impractical.
examples: Research lab may need interlock to fume hood
Manufacturing may need interlock to E-stop system
Entertainment may need interlock to venue security
Medical may need interlock to room door
why_no_mandate_explained.result: Responsibility shifts to the LSO to determine appropriate interlock configuration for each application

items.action: Verify interlock connector exists on all Class 3B/4 lasers
Configure interlock to appropriate safety system
Train operators on interlock purpose and function
